positive: Stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical mountain landscape at sunset, featuring abstract, simplified mountain silhouettes, flowing stylized clouds, and a crescent moon. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical and centered, utilizing negative space effectively. Color palette should be deep indigo blues, soft lavender purples, warm burnt orange, and muted gold accents. The style must mimic elegant screen printing or a vector illustration, with clean, defined edges, limited gradients, and high contrast. Emphasize bold shapes and strong geometric silhouettes suitable for a single-color print on fabric.
negative: photo, photorealistic, background clutter, noise, grainy, text, writing, watermark, signature, blurry, bad anatomy, messy, extra limbs, low contrast, cartoonish, oil painting
